name: Share Transaction Flow
content:
graph TD
    A[User Selects Transactions] -->|Choose transactions to share| B[Enter Recipient Email]
    B -->|Validate email format| C{Email Valid?}
    C -->|No| D[Show Error Message]
    D -->|Retry| B
    C -->|Yes| E[Confirm Share Action]
    E -->|User confirms| F[System Creates Share Record]
    F -->|Send notification| G[Email Recipient]
    G -->|Recipient logs in| H[View Menu Option]
    H -->|Access shared transactions| I[Display Shared Transactions in UI]
    I -->|Read-only access| J[User Views Combined Transactions]
    J -->|Own transactions + Shared| K[End]
